[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100000000 1
1 000100000 1
2 100001010 3
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 100001110 4
6 001000000 1
7 001100000 2

12 21 001000000 1 match 6
23 32 001000000 1 match 6
34 43 100000000 1 match 0

67 76 000010000 1
70 07 001000000 1 match 6

71 17 001000000 1 match 6

47 74 000000000 a match 3 4

72 27 001000000 1 match 6

26 62 000000000 a match 3 4
